name: Moss
description: Water retention intelligence through fractal surface area maximization. Achieves desiccation tolerance via anhydrobiosis — entering suspended animation when dry and reviving when wet, surviving for decades in cryptobiotic state. Colonizes bare rock through rhizoid anchoring without true roots, capturing atmospheric nutrients directly. Engineers moisture-gradient microhabitats that enable succession of larger plant communities.

core_attributes.pattern: capillary water retention, cryptobiotic desiccation tolerance, atmospheric nutrient capture
